title: conyza neglecta
intro: Conyza neglecta, also known as the bushy fleabane, is a perennial herb native to Europe and Asia, often found growing in wetlands and meadows. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. Conyza neglecta has been reported to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and calming respiratory problems. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in some traditional remedies for its supposed healing properties.
